pi_items.source: setup_task.sh logic assigning this ID to the 0-recall, fast-RT data block, and verifier.py asserting CONTAMINATED_ID='sub-999'
verifier.py checks 'overall_recall == 0.0 and mean_rt < 50.0' to determine the excluded flag.
setup_task.sh generating participants via range(1, 31) and verifier.py computing gt validity count.
verifier.py attempts to read the result file from this path.

pi_items.metadata_value: Programmatically generated unique dataset simulating human free recall with serial position effects
pi_items.verified_value: Programmatically generated unique dataset simulating human free recall with serial position effects
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates the CSV data using python3 with a U-shaped base_probs array mimicking serial position curves.

privileged_info_summary: The data is confirmed to be programmatically generated synthetically via setup scripts, simulating 30 valid participants and 1 contaminated participant ('sub-999'). The exact contamination criteria enforced by the verifier is overall recall of 0.0 and mean response time < 50ms. The final group serial position curve calculations and participant scores are evaluated against a dynamically generated ground truth from this synthetic data.
